allow: Bash(/c/Python313/python.exe -c "import openpyxl, sys; wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(''sprint1.xlsx''\); ws = wb[''Sprint 1'']; [sys.stdout.write\(repr\(row\) + ''\\n''\) for i,row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=31, max_row=100, values_only=True\)\) if any\(cell is not None for cell in row\)]")
